class.name: PlayFabPartyChat
class.description:
Reached as [code]PlayFab.party.chat[/code] (or [method PlayFabParty.get_chat]). Chat is decoupled from the transport peer: it is fully meshed by the Party SDK — every connected chat control sees every other — and is addressed by PlayFab entity keys (a [code]{ "id", "type" }[/code] dictionary) rather than transport peer ids. There is exactly one local chat control per local user. Chat-control creation is decoupled from network join: create it explicitly with [method create_local_chat_control_async] (which owns the audio devices and the voice/text/transcription flags from the [PlayFabPartyConfig]), then [method PlayFabParty.create_and_join_network_async] / [method PlayFabParty.join_network_async] connect that control to each network automatically. Network join never creates a chat control. The control survives leaving and rejoining and is only destroyed via [method destroy_local_chat_control_async], user release, or Party shutdown. [codeblock] # Create the local chat control once (before joining a network): var result = await PlayFab.party.chat.create_local_chat_control_async(user, config)
# Send to the whole mesh (empty target == broadcast): PlayFab.party.chat.send_text_async("hello everyone")
# React to incoming messages: PlayFab.party.chat.text_message_received.connect(func(entity_key, message): print(entity_key.id, ": ", message.text)) [/codeblock]

method.name: create_local_chat_control_async
method.description: Explicitly creates the local chat control for [param user], decoupled from any network join. The audio input/output devices and the voice/text/transcription flags from [param config] are applied to the control here, where it is owned. A local user keeps a single chat control reused across networks; subsequent network joins for [param user] connect this control automatically. Idempotent — a second call for an existing control resolves with that control. The completed [PlayFabResult] carries the [PlayFabPartyChatControl] on success.

method.name: destroy_local_chat_control_async
method.description: Explicitly destroys the local chat control for [param user]. Idempotent — a no-op success when [param user] has no chat control.

method.name: get_local_chat_control
method.description: Returns the local [PlayFabPartyChatControl] bound to [param user], if any.

method.name: get_chat_controls
method.description: Returns all known [PlayFabPartyChatControl] instances, local and remote.

method.name: get_remote_entity_keys
method.description: Returns the PlayFab entity-key dictionaries ([code]{ "id", "type" }[/code]) of every remote chat control currently in the mesh.

method.name: get_chat_control
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabPartyChatControl] identified by the PlayFab entity key [param entity_key] (a [code]{ "id", "type" }[/code] dictionary), if known.

method.name: send_text_async
method.description: Sends [param message] through the local Party chat control. [param target_entity_keys] is an array of PlayFab entity-key dictionaries ([code]{ "id", "type" }[/code]); an empty array broadcasts to every remote chat control in the mesh; unknown entity keys return a failed [PlayFabResult].

method.name: set_audio_muted_async
method.description: Mutes or unmutes incoming [b]voice audio[/b] from the chat control identified by the PlayFab entity key [param entity_key] on the local chat control. Independent of [method set_text_muted_async]. Emits [signal audio_muted_changed] on success.

method.name: set_chat_permissions_async
method.description: Updates the local chat-control relationship permissions for the chat control identified by the PlayFab entity key [param entity_key]. See [enum PlayFabParty.ChatPermission].

method.name: set_text_muted_async
method.description: Mutes or unmutes incoming [b]text chat[/b] from the chat control identified by the PlayFab entity key [param entity_key] on the local chat control. Independent of [method set_audio_muted_async]. Emits [signal text_muted_changed] on success.

signal.name: state_changed
signal.description: Aggregate signal for chat-control state changes.

signal.name: chat_control_added
signal.description: Emitted when a chat control identified by the PlayFab entity key [param entity_key] (a [code]{ "id", "type" }[/code] dictionary) joins the mesh.

signal.name: chat_control_removed
signal.description: Emitted when the chat control identified by the PlayFab entity key [param entity_key] leaves the mesh.

signal.name: text_message_received
signal.description: Emitted when a text chat message is received from the chat control identified by the PlayFab entity key [param entity_key].

signal.name: transcription_received
signal.description: Emitted when a speech-to-text transcription is received from the chat control identified by the PlayFab entity key [param entity_key].

signal.name: chat_permissions_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the local chat-control relationship permissions for the chat control identified by the PlayFab entity key [param entity_key] change.

signal.name: audio_muted_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the incoming [b]voice audio[/b] mute state of the chat control identified by the PlayFab entity key [param entity_key] on the local chat control changes.

signal.name: text_muted_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the incoming [b]text chat[/b] mute state of the chat control identified by the PlayFab entity key [param entity_key] on the local chat control changes.
